title: Redo Announces $81 Million Series B to Support Commerce Technology Expansion
body: Draper, Utah, June 23, 2026
Commerce technology platform raises Series B financing
Announcement covers funding, valuation, product expansion, and acquisition

title: Agenda
body: Series B financing details and valuation
Current platform adoption metrics
Strategic vision and market positioning
Planned AI-driven product developments
Returns network infrastructure
ReturnBear acquisition and international expansion

title: Series B Financing Round
body: Redo raised $81 million in Series B financing
The round values the company at $1.25 billion
Funding announced June 23, 2026 from Draper, Utah headquarters

title: Investor Composition
body: Smash Capital led the Series B round
Pelion Venture Partners participated as existing investor
Cervin Ventures participated as existing investor

title: Current Platform Adoption
body: More than 4,100 brands use the Redo platform today
Over 1,750 merchants use multiple Redo offerings across the suite
Platform demonstrates cross-product adoption among merchant base

title: CEO Strategic Vision
body: Sterling Snow, co-founder and CEO, stated: 'Every merchant is fighting to own the relationship with their shoppers'
Funding will accelerate the mission to help merchants own shopper relationships
Capital enables building infrastructure brands need for customer ownership

title: Lead Investor Perspective
body: Paul Szurek of Smash Capital commented on the investment
Redo started by building trust through post purchase experiences
The company has expanded into a much larger opportunity beyond initial focus

title: AI-Driven Commerce Tools Development
body: New capital will fund development of AI-driven commerce tools
Platform expansion represents strategic use of Series B proceeds
Three major AI product initiatives planned for development

title: Agentic Shopping Experiences
body: Redo plans to build agentic shopping experiences
Experiences will be tailored to individual shoppers
AI agents designed to personalize the shopping journey

title: Marketing Agent for Personalized Campaigns
body: Development includes a marketing agent for personalized campaigns
Agent will handle personalized email campaigns
Agent will handle personalized text campaigns

title: Post-Purchase Concierge Service
body: Post-purchase concierge service planned as AI-driven tool
Service designed to increase customer lifetime value
Extends Redo's focus on post-purchase customer experience

title: Local Returns Network Infrastructure
body: Aaron Evett, chief commerce officer, described the returns network
Network allows customers to return products locally
Redo can inspect, refurbish, re-fulfill, and reship inventory through the network

title: ReturnBear Acquisition
body: Redo announced the acquisition of ReturnBear
Acquisition announced alongside the Series B financing
Deal extends returns servicing capabilities

title: International Returns Coverage Expansion
body: ReturnBear acquisition extends returns servicing coverage to more than 100 countries
Expansion significantly broadens geographic reach of returns network
International coverage supports global merchant operations

title: International Merchant Network Expansion
body: Redo outlined plans for international expansion of its merchant network
Expansion plans complement the ReturnBear acquisition
Company positioning for global commerce technology market

title: Outlook
body: Redo combining $81 million Series B capital with ReturnBear acquisition
AI product development and international expansion as dual growth strategies
Company advancing from post-purchase focus to comprehensive commerce platform at $1.25 billion valuation
